Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Look for captive-bred specimens from reputable breeders to avoid wild-caught adults. Nicaraguan form is considered the 'true' bloodline if breeding is your goal. Start with a juvenile (2-3") rather than a tiny sling for easier care, but avoid adults if you want to enjoy their full lifespan.
